title: polypodium lineare var. thunbergianum
intro: Polypodium lineare var. thunbergianum, also known as Thunberg's Polypody, is a variety of the Polypodium lineare fern species, native to Asia and part of the Polypodiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. Its medicinal properties have been attributed to its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat various health conditions such as arthritis and respiratory issues. Polypodium lineare var. thunbergianum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its health benefits, which include soothing digestive issues, relieving headaches, and supporting immune function.
